text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I lost... again. I missed out on performing center
stage... again.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I can't go on like this! I need to train even more if
I want to win!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I am going to be a top Umadol and inspire everyone!
choice_data_list: Rushing things is no good either, you know.
Rushing things is no good either, you know.
Yeah! Show me your Umadol spirit!
Yeah! Show me your Umadol spirit!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I am going to be a top Umadol and inspire everyone!
choice_data_list: Rushing things is no good either, you know.
Rushing things is no good either, you know.
Yeah! Show me your Umadol spirit!
Yeah! Show me your Umadol spirit!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But I keep on losing! I can't help but feel
pressured!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I wanna start winning as soon as possible! I want
you to put my training on Hardcore Umadol
mode!
choice_data_list:
As an idol, you have to be very careful about
changing your image.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Anyone would be surprised if their favorite idol
suddenly started acting differently, huh?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I can't allow that! An Umadol has to treasure the
feelings of their fans!
choice_data_list: It's fine to keep going at your own pace.
It's fine to keep going at your own pace.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'll keep aiming to be the cutest top Umadol, just
like usual!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'll put my Umadol spirit on full throttle and work
as hard as I can. Which means...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I need you to cheer me on as hard as you can!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Ehehe. That's put some pep in my step!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
No more losing! I'm going to win and put on the
best concerts possible! ☆
